cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Mannish Man, Manly Minotaur
W 1WW 3 Creature - Minotaur Creature 2/2
2 Exalted When Mannish Man enters, search your library for The Enchiridion, reveal it, and put it into your hand.
Lobster Soul
W 1W 2 Creature - Lobster Spirit Creature 1/1
2 Sacrifice this creature: Create a Food Token.
Meat Prepared Sous Vide
U 2U 3 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. You may put it into your hand. If you don’t, draw two cards. Put all revealed cards on the bottom of your library in a random order,
Bird from the Window
W W 1 Creature - Bird Creature 1/1
2 Flying Sacrifice this creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
Tears for Salt
U 1U 2 Instant Instant
3 Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
Prismo's Pickles
G 1G 2 Legendary Artifact - Food Artifact
1 {T}, Sacrifice Prismo’s Pickles: You gain 3 life. Search your library for Prismo. Reveal him, and put him into your hand, then shuffle your library. Exile Bird from the Window, Tears for Salt, Meat Prepared Sous Vide, and Lobster Soul from your graveyard: Transform Prismo’s Pickles.
The Perfect Sandwich
0 Legendary Artifact - Food Artifact
1 {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 10 life. Until your next turn, your life total can’t change and you gain protection from everything.
Lemonhope
W 1W 2 Creature - Food Citizen Creature 1/2
2 {T}: Up to three target creatures get +1/+1 until end of turn.
Zombie Candy People
W 2W 3 Creature - Zombie Food Citizen Creature 2/1
2 Sacrifice a non-Zombie Food: Create a 1/1 Zombie Food Citizen creature token.
The Enchiridion
5 5 Legendary Artifact Artifact
1 At the beginning of your main phase, exile the top three cards of each player’s libraries. Until end of turn, you may play cards from among those and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast those spells.
Soft People
W 2W 3 Creature - Citizen Creature 1/1
2 Whenever one or more creatures attack you, create a Treasure token for each Kingdom you control.
Why-wolves
U 2UU 4 Creature - Werewolf Creature 2/2
2 When Why-wolves deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards.
Donny, a Jerk
G 3GG 5 Legendary Creature - Ogre Creature 3/3
2 Trample, riot Obnoxygen — Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1.
Soft Village
0 Land - Kingdom Land
0 {T}: Add {W}. {T}: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to any target.
Cube Village
0 Land - Kingdom Land
0 {T}: Add {U}. {T}: The next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn can’t be countered.
The Beneathaverse
0 Land - Kingdom Land
0 {T}: Add CC. This mana can only be spent to cast artifacts or to activate an ability of an artifact.
Upturnoverdrive
3 3 Artifact Artifact
1 {T}: Draw a card, Discard a card. Put a charge counter on Upturnoverdrive. Remove 10 charge counters from this artifact: Exchange your hand and graveyard.
The Crystal Gem Apple
4 4 Legendary Artifact Artifact
1 {T}, Pay 4 life, Sacrifice this artifact: Look at target opponent’s hand and exile those cards face down. You may play those cards this turn, and mana of any type can be spent to cast them. Until end of turn, whenever you play a land or cast a spell this way, its owner draws a card. At the beginning of the next end step, return the exiled cards to their owner’s hand. Activate only as a sorcery.
Fourth Dimensional Sword
3 3 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, draw 2 random non-basic cards from your sideboard. Equip {2}
Eat their Flesh
B 2B 3 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Destroy target creature. Draw a card.
Flesh Eating Skeletons
B 1BB 3 Creature - Skeleton Creature 1/2
2 Whenever this creature deals damage, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.
Tricked by the River
UB 1UB 3 Instant Instant
3 Return target spell to its owner’s hand. Its controller discards two cards.
Lost a Music Battle
B 1B 2 Instant Instant
3 Destroy target creature unless its controller controls a Food.
River of Forgetfulness
0 Land Land
0 {T}: Add {C}. Whenever one or more creatures attack you, you may pay {1}. If you do, target creature loses all abilities until end of turn.
Worm College
U XUU 2 Sorcery Sorcery
3 Reveal the top X+1 cards of your library. Secretly put 1 of them into your hand, and the rest on the bottom of your library. Repeat the process X times.
Theoretical Fightonomics
U 2U 3 Instant Instant
3 Choose target attacking creature and target creature blocking that creature. Put a fight counter on one of those creatures. At the end of combat, if that creature is on the battlefield, draw 3 cards.
Ancient Psychic Tandem War Elephant
WUR 3URW 6 Legendary Creature - Elephant Creature 8/4
2 Trample When Ancient Psychic Tandem War Elephant enters, target opponent reveals their hand. Draw X cards, where X is the number of non-land cards revealed.
